finding: `next --claim --auto-intent` can still classify a backlog/doc delivery as `closeout-only`, and the operator only discovers the mismatch when `git commit --auto-stage` rejects source mutations with `ATM_GIT_COMMIT_CLOSEOUT_ONLY_MUTATION`.
expectedBehavior: Auto-intent should infer `write` for open tasks with declared non-.atm deliverables or prompts that ask to update backlog/source, or `next --claim` should print a stronger warning and copyable `--claim-intent write` recovery before work begins.
evidenceOrRepro: During TASK-TEAM-0084, auto-intent claimed `closeout-only`; the commit wrapper correctly failed early and required `node atm.mjs next --claim --actor "Codex-GPT5.6 Terra" --task "TASK-TEAM-0084" --claim-intent write --json`. Earlier preflight guard row `ATM-BUG-2026-07-07-043` remains fixed; this row tracks the remaining UX friction.
followUp: Add an auto-intent regression for backlog/document delivery prompts and surface a pre-edit warning or default write intent.
